CONTENT.Honours: Jeonbuk Hyundai MotorsK League 1: 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021KFA Cup: 2020, 2022South Korea U23Asian Games: 2018AFC U-23 Championship: 2020AFC U-23 Championship Best Goalkeeper: 2020
CONTENT.Club career: On 20 February 2018, Song made his professional debut in 2018 AFC Champions League against Kitchee SC.On 18 December 2022, Song officially joined Japanese side Shonan Bellmare on a permanent transfer.
CONTENT.Private life: In April 2024, it was announced by Antenna Entertainment that Song is in a romantic relationship with one of their artists, singer Lee Mijoo.
CONTENT.External links: Song Bum-keun – K League stats at kleague.com (in Korean)Song Bum-keun at National-Football-Teams.com

SUMMARY: Song Bum-keun (Korean: 송범근; born 15 October 1997) is a South Korean professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for J1 League club Shonan Bellmare and the South Korea national team.
